page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: AOSC484 or AOSC6 84.

AOSC798 Directed Graduate Research (1-3 Credits) Directed graduate research in atmospheric and oceanic science. Repeatable to: 15 credits.

AOSC818 Frontiers in Atmosphere, Ocean, Climate, and Synoptic Meteorology Research (1 Credit)

A broad range of topics in the contemporary sciences of atmosphere, ocean, climate and synoptic meteorology are covered.

Repeatable to: 18 credits if content differs.
